message:
fix(abi): use libc::sighandler_t for ssignal/sysv_signal/sigset and fix SIG_ERR handling

- Change signal function return types from Option<fn> to sighandler_t
- Return SIG_ERR on failure instead of None
- Add sigset_invalid_signal_sets_errno test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
